# detectDuplicates

> Find duplicate prompts by hash within a time window

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| db | Database | yes |
| start | string | yes |
| end | string | yes |
| minOccurrences | integer | yes |

graph TD
